Implement the following plan:

# CitedBy.ai вҖ” Refonte Frontend ComplГЁte

## Context
CitedBy.ai est un SaaS AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) construit avec Next.js 14 App Router. Le projet a dГ©jГ  une base solide (types, services, lib, i18n, composants UI, API routes) mais le frontend doit ГӘtre **entiГЁrement reconstruit** avec un design dark premium (style Linear/Vercel) et des donnГ©es mock pour fonctionner sans Supabase/API keys.

**Projet** : `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaSV13 - Rick`

## Ce qui est CONSERVГү tel quel
- `types.ts` вҖ” Toutes les interfaces TypeScript
- `components/ui/` вҖ” 13 composants UI production-ready
- `components/charts/` вҖ” 3 composants Recharts
- `components/ScoreRing.tsx`, `CategoryCard.tsx`, `RecommendationCard.tsx`, `AICitationPreview.tsx`
- `tailwind.config.ts` вҖ” Design tokens (primary: #10b981, bg: #0a0a0f)
- `i18n/` вҖ” SystГЁme multilingue FR/EN/ES
- `lib/` вҖ” Utilitaires (utils.ts, theme-context, workspace-context)
- `services/` вҖ” 15 services AI
- `app/api/` вҖ” Routes API intactes
- `app/layout.tsx` вҖ” Root layout avec fonts

## Design Direction
- Dark premium : `bg-[#0a0a0f]`, cards `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl`
- Primary emerald `#10b981` pour accents/CTAs/Г©tats actifs
- Gradients subtils pour hero et scores
- Animations : `fade-in-up`, `scale-in`, `shimmer` (dГ©jГ  dans globals.css)
- Fonts : DM Sans (sans) + Instrument Serif (serif)
- IcГҙnes : lucide-react

---

## Phase 0 : Fondation (mock data + auth bypass)

### CrГ©er
- **`lib/mock-data.ts`** вҖ” DonnГ©es mock centrales typГ©es (MOCK_USER, MOCK_WORKSPACE, MOCK_PROJECTSГ—3, MOCK_ANALYSIS_RESULT, MOCK_CITATIONSГ—8, MOCK_RECOMMENDATIONSГ—6, MOCK_TREND_DATAГ—8 semaines, MOCK_ENGINE_DATAГ—5, MOCK_COMPETITOR_DATAГ—5, MOCK_REPUTATION_REPORT, MOCK_SMC_CONTENTSГ—4, MOCK_DIRECTORY_ENTRIESГ—8, MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS, MOCK_ACTIVITY_FEEDГ—10)
- **`lib/mock-auth.tsx`** вҖ” MockAuthProvider + useMockAuth() hook

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/layout.tsx`** вҖ” Auth bypass conditionnel (si pas de Supabase env vars вҶ’ mock auth)
- **`lib/workspace-context.tsx`** вҖ” Fallback vers MOCK_WORKSPACE si Supabase Г©choue
- **`components/providers.tsx`** вҖ” Ajouter MockAuthProvider + I18nProvider

---

## Phase 1 : Shell & Navigation

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/sidebar.tsx`** вҖ” RГ©Г©criture complГЁte :
  - Nav principale : Dashboard, Analyze, Projects, Analytics, Executive
  - Section Generative Tools (collapsible) : 6 sous-items
  - Directory, Recharge, Affiliation
  - Section Settings (collapsible) : billing, api, integrations, team
  - Account en bas
  - Credits display, workspace switcher, language selector
  - Mobile responsive avec hamburger + overlay

---

## Phase 2A : Pages Publiques (parallГЁle avec Phase 1)

### Modifier
- **`app/(public)/page.tsx`** вҖ” Landing page redesign (hero + gradient orbs, features grid, pricing 3 tiers, testimonials, FAQ accordion, footer)
- **`app/(auth)/layout.tsx`** вҖ” Layout dark centrГ©
- **`app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`** вҖ” Design split/centered, mock auth bypass
- **`app/(auth)/register/page.tsx`** вҖ” MГӘme approche + champ nom + checkbox CGU

---

## Phase 2B : Dashboard + Onboarding (aprГЁs Phase 0+1)

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/page.tsx`** вҖ” Dashboard : 4 KPI cards, trend chart, engine chart, activity feed, quick actions
- **`app/(app)/app/onboarding/page.tsx`** вҖ” Wizard 3 Г©tapes avec design amГ©liorГ©

---

## Phase 3A : Module Projects (aprГЁs Phase 2B)

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/page.tsx`** вҖ” Liste projets avec search/filter, grid cards, empty state
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/layout.tsx`** вҖ” Breadcrumb + 5 tabs + header projet
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/overview/page.tsx`** вҖ” KPIs, charts, alerts, scan button mock
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/citations/page.tsx`** вҖ” Citations filtrables par engine
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/ai-visibility/page.tsx`** вҖ” Scores par engine + progress bars
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/recommendations/page.tsx`** вҖ” Filtres + RecommendationCards
- **`app/(app)/app/projects/[id]/packs/page.tsx`** вҖ” Content packs avec generate modal

---

## Phase 3B : Analytics + Executive (parallГЁle avec 3A)

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/analytics/page.tsx`** вҖ” Period selector, KPIs, Recharts trend chart, top prompts
- **`app/(app)/app/executive/page.tsx`** вҖ” KPIs premium, ROI metrics, charts, executive summary

---

## Phase 4A : Page Analyze (aprГЁs Phase 1)

### CrГ©er
- **`app/(app)/app/analyze/page.tsx`** вҖ” URL input glassmorphism, progress animation mock (crawlingвҶ’analyzingвҶ’scoringвҶ’generating), rГ©sultats avec ScoreRing + CategoryCards

---

## Phase 4B : Generative Tools (aprГЁs Phase 1)

### CrГ©er
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/page.tsx`** вҖ” Hub : grid 6 cards outil
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/layout.tsx`** вҖ” Layout wrapper
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/smc-studio/page.tsx`** вҖ” Studio/Library tabs, 3 outils (Fiche/FAQ/Article), gГ©nГ©ration mock
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/content-writer/page.tsx`** вҖ” Multi-step (verticalвҶ’typeвҶ’formвҶ’result), 9 verticals, 8 content types
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/reputation/page.tsx`** вҖ” FormвҶ’Results, sentiment score, mentions, competitor comparison
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/source-of-truth/page.tsx`** вҖ” Form entreprise, services dynamiques, FAQs, gГ©nГ©ration llm.txt
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/schema-org/page.tsx`** вҖ” Form + type selector, JSON-LD output
- **`app/(app)/app/generative-tools/robots-txt/page.tsx`** вҖ” Platform selector, toggles AI bots, output robots.txt

---

## Phase 4C : Directory (aprГЁs Phase 1)

### CrГ©er
- **`app/(app)/app/directory/page.tsx`** вҖ” Search/filter, grid entries, "Join" CTA
- **`app/(app)/app/directory/[id]/page.tsx`** вҖ” Profil entitГ© : score ring, catГ©gories, engines

---

## Phase 4D : Recharge + Affiliation + Account (aprГЁs Phase 1)

### CrГ©er
- **`app/(app)/app/recharge/page.tsx`** вҖ” Credits display, 3 packs (Jerrican/Pompe/Citerne), achat mock
- **`app/(app)/app/affiliation/page.tsx`** вҖ” 3 tabs (Overview/Referrals/Payouts), lien affiliГ©, stats
- **`app/(app)/app/account/page.tsx`** вҖ” Profil Г©ditable, password, notifications, data export

---

## Phase 5 : Settings (aprГЁs Phase 1)

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/settings/page.tsx`** вҖ” Refresh design
- **`app/(app)/app/settings/billing/page.tsx`** вҖ” Refresh design
- **`app/(app)/app/settings/api/page.tsx`** вҖ” CRUD clГ©s API + docs
- **`app/(app)/app/settings/integrations/page.tsx`** вҖ” Cards GSC/Slack/Zapier

---

## Phase 6 : Polish & Composants PartagГ©s

### CrГ©er
- **`components/page-header.tsx`** вҖ” Header rГ©utilisable (title, description, breadcrumbs, actions)
- **`components/kpi-card.tsx`** вҖ” Card KPI rГ©utilisable (label, value, change, icon)
- **`components/code-block.tsx`** вҖ” Affichage code (JSON-LD, robots.txt) avec copy
- **`components/progress-bar.tsx`** вҖ” Barre de progression animГ©e

### Modifier
- **`app/(app)/app/loading.tsx`**, **`error.tsx`**, **`not-found.tsx`** вҖ” Design refresh
- **`components/ui/index.ts`** вҖ” Ajouter exports des nouveaux composants

---

## Graphe de DГ©pendances

```
Phase 0 (Fondation)
  в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 1 (Navigation)
  в”Ӯ     в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 2B (Dashboard) вҶ’ Phase 3A (Projects) + Phase 3B (Analytics)
  в”Ӯ     в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 4A (Analyze)          в”җ
  в”Ӯ     в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 4B (Generative Tools) в”Ӯ Tous en
  в”Ӯ     в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 4C (Directory)        в”Ӯ parallГЁle
  в”Ӯ     в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 4D (Recharge/Affil)   в”Ӯ
  в”Ӯ     в””в”Җв”Җ Phase 5 (Settings)          в”ҳ
  в””в”Җв”Җ Phase 2A (Pages Publiques) вҶҗ parallГЁle avec Phase 1

Phase 6 (Polish) вҖ” aprГЁs tout le reste
```

## Totaux
- **~20 fichiers Г  crГ©er**, **~27 fichiers Г  modifier** = **~47 fichiers**
- **~30 routes/pages** au total

## VГ©rification
1. `npm run build` вҖ” Le build Next.js doit passer sans erreurs
2. `npm run dev` вҖ” Toutes les pages accessibles via navigation sidebar
3. VГ©rifier chaque route manuellement dans le navigateur
4. VГ©rifier le responsive (mobile sidebar, bottom nav)
5. VГ©rifier que tout fonctionne SANS variables d'environnement Supabase/Stripe


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\User\.claude\projects\C--Users-User\a11f01ea-461c-4cd4-9415-996c5e54cc85.jsonl

1вҶ’"use client"
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4вҶ’import { Toaster } from "@/components/ui/toast"
     5вҶ’import { ThemeProvider } from "@/lib/theme-context"
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’export function Providers({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
     8вҶ’  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false)
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
    11вҶ’    setMounted(true)
    12вҶ’  }, [])
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’  return (
    15вҶ’    <ThemeProvider>
    16вҶ’      {children}
    17вҶ’      {mounted && <Toaster />}
    18вҶ’    </ThemeProvider>
    19вҶ’  )
    20вҶ’}
    21вҶ’

1вҶ’"use client"
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’import React, { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4вҶ’import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client"
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’interface WorkspaceData {
     7вҶ’  id: string
     8вҶ’  name: string
     9вҶ’  slug: string
    10вҶ’  plan: string
    11вҶ’  plan_status: string
    12вҶ’  credits_remaining: number
    13вҶ’  role: string
    14вҶ’}
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’interface WorkspaceContextValue {
    17вҶ’  workspace: WorkspaceData | null
    18вҶ’  isLoading: boolean
    19вҶ’  reload: () => void
    20вҶ’}
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’const WorkspaceContext = createContext<WorkspaceContextValue>({
    23вҶ’  workspace: null,
    24вҶ’  isLoading: true,
    25вҶ’  reload: () => {},
    26вҶ’})
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’export function WorkspaceProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    29вҶ’  const [workspace, setWorkspace] = useState<WorkspaceData | null>(null)
    30вҶ’  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’  const loadWorkspace = async () => {
    33вҶ’    try {
    34вҶ’      const supabase = createClient()
    35вҶ’      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    36вҶ’      if (!user) {
    37вҶ’        setWorkspace(null)
    38вҶ’        setIsLoading(false)
    39вҶ’        return
    40вҶ’      }
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’      const { data, error } = await supabase
    43вҶ’        .from("workspace_users")
    44вҶ’        .select("role, workspaces(id, name, slug, plan, plan_status, credits_remaining)")
    45вҶ’        .eq("user_id", user.id)
    46вҶ’        .limit(1)
    47вҶ’        .single()
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’      if (error || !data) {
    50вҶ’        setWorkspace(null)
    51вҶ’        setIsLoading(false)
    52вҶ’        return
    53вҶ’      }
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’      const ws = data.workspaces as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
    56вҶ’      setWorkspace({
    57вҶ’        id: ws.id as string,
    58вҶ’        name: ws.name as string,
    59вҶ’        slug: ws.slug as string,
    60вҶ’        plan: ws.plan as string,
    61вҶ’        plan_status: ws.plan_status as string,
    62вҶ’        credits_remaining: ws.credits_remaining as number,
    63вҶ’        role: data.role,
    64вҶ’      })
    65вҶ’    } catch {
    66вҶ’      setWorkspace(null)
    67вҶ’    } finally {
    68вҶ’      setIsLoading(false)
    69вҶ’    }
    70вҶ’  }
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
    73вҶ’    loadWorkspace()
    74вҶ’  }, [])
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’  return (
    77вҶ’    <WorkspaceContext.Provider value={{ workspace, isLoading, reload: loadWorkspace }}>
    78вҶ’      {children}
    79вҶ’    </WorkspaceContext.Provider>
    80вҶ’  )
    81вҶ’}
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’export function useWorkspace() {
    84вҶ’  return useContext(WorkspaceContext)
    85вҶ’}
    86вҶ’

     3вҶ’import { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’type Theme = "dark" | "light"
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’interface ThemeContextValue {
     8вҶ’  theme: Theme
     9вҶ’  toggleTheme: () => void
    10вҶ’}
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’const ThemeContext = createContext<ThemeContextValue>({
    13вҶ’  theme: "dark",
    14вҶ’  toggleTheme: () => {},
    15вҶ’})
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’export function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    18вҶ’  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<Theme>("dark")
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
    21вҶ’    const stored = localStorage.getItem("citedby-theme") as Theme | null
    22вҶ’    if (stored) {
    23вҶ’      setTheme(stored)
    24вҶ’      document.documentElement.className = stored
    25вҶ’    }
    26вҶ’  }, [])
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’  const toggleTheme = () => {
    29вҶ’    const next = theme === "dark" ? "light" : "dark"
    30вҶ’    setTheme(next)
    31вҶ’    document.documentElement.className = next
    32вҶ’    localStorage.setItem("citedby-theme", next)
    33вҶ’  }
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’  return (
    36вҶ’    <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ theme, toggleTheme }}>
    37вҶ’      {children}
    38вҶ’    </ThemeContext.Provider>
    39вҶ’  )
    40вҶ’}
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’export function useTheme() {
    43вҶ’  return useContext(ThemeContext)

Nos citations sur ChatGPT ont triple.", rating: 5, }, { name: "Thomas Martin", role: "CEO, AgenceDigitale.fr", content: "CitedBy.ai nous permet de proposer un service AEO unique a nos clients. Contrairement au SEO classique qui vise les resultats de recherche, l'AEO vise a ce que les IA citent et recommandent votre marque.", }, { q: "Comment fonctionne le monitoring ?", a: "CitedBy.ai envoie des requetes test aux 5 principaux moteurs IA avec des prompts lies a votre secteur. Nous analysons les reponses pour detecter vos citations, mentions et la visibilite de votre marque. Vous recevez un score de 0 a 100.", }, { q: "Quels moteurs IA sont supportes ?", a: "Nous monitorons ChatGPT (OpenAI), Perplexity, Google Gemini, Claude (Anthropic) et Microsoft Copilot. De nouveaux moteurs sont ajoutes regulierement.", }, { q: "En quoi est-ce different du SEO classique ?", a: "Le SEO optimise pour les resultats de recherche Google. Les deux sont complementaires вҖ” un bon SEO aide votre AEO, mais l'AEO necessite des techniques specifiques (Schema.org, Answer-First, contenu extractible).", }, { q: "Puis-je tester gratuitement ?", a: "Oui. import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, DollarSign, Eye, Quote, Users, Target, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, Download, Calendar, BarChart3, Zap, } from "lucide-react"; import { VisibilityTrendChart } from "@/components/charts/visibility-trend-chart"; import { EngineBreakdownChart } from "@/components/charts/engine-breakdown-chart"; import { CompetitorChart } from "@/components/charts/competitor-chart"; // Mock executive data вҖ” aggregated from workspace analytics const MOCK_KPI = { visibility: { value: 64, change: 12, trend: "up" as "up" | "down" }, citations: { value: 47, change: 18, trend: "up" as "up" | "down" }, mentions: { value: 134, change: -3, trend: "down" as "up" | "down" }, shareOfVoice: { value: 28, change: 5, trend: "up" as "up" | "down" }, }; const MOCK_ROI = { estimatedReach: 45000, costPerCitation: 12.5, contentROI: 340, timeToFirstCitation: 4.2, }; const MOCK_MONTHLY_DATA = [ { date: "Oct", score: 35, citations: 8, mentions: 42 }, { date: "Nov", score: 41, citations: 15, mentions: 58 }, { date: "Dec", score: 48, citations: 22, mentions: 75 }, { date: "Jan", score: 55, citations: 31, mentions: 98 }, { date: "Fev", score: 64, citations: 47, mentions: 134 }, ]; const MOCK_ENGINE_DATA = [ { engine: "ChatGPT", score: 72, mentions: 45, citations: 18 }, { engine: "Perplexity", score: 58, mentions: 32, citations: 12 }, { engine: "Gemini", score: 45, mentions: 22, citations: 6 }, { engine: "Claude", score: 61, mentions: 25, citations: 8 }, { engine: "Copilot", score: 33, mentions: 10, citations: 3 }, ]; const MOCK_COMPETITORS = [ { name: "Notre marque", mentions: 134 }, { name: "Concurrent A", mentions: 198 }, { name: "Concurrent B", mentions: 87 }, { name: "Concurrent C", mentions: 56 }, { name: "Concurrent D", mentions: 42 }, ]; const MOCK_TOP_PROMPTS = [ { prompt: "meilleur outil AEO", citations: 8, position: 1 }, { prompt: "optimiser visibilite IA", citations: 5, position: 2 }, { prompt: "comment etre cite par ChatGPT", citations: 4, position: 1 }, { prompt: "outil monitoring IA", citations: 3, position: 3 }, { prompt: "answer engine optimization", citations: 3, position: 2 }, ]; - **Project**: `id, name, domain, logo, status, visibilityScore, trend, lastRun, nextRun`
- **Recommendation**: `id, priority, title, description, action, effort, impact, category`
- **CategoryScore**: `name, score, weight, items[]`
- **AnalysisResult**: `url, timestamp, globalScore, categories, recommendations, aiCitation, robotsTxtData, generatedSolutions`
- **RobotsTxtData**: `content, isUnlocked, platform, generatedAt`
- **GeneratedSolution**: `title, explanation, content, type, language, implementationSteps`
- **SourceOfTruthData**: `description, type, founded, location, services[], faqs[]`
- **SMCContent**: `id, type, title, content, timestamp, meta`
- **ContentWriterInput**: `vertical, contentType, brandName, targetAudience, tone, language`
- **GeneratedContent**: `title, content, metaDescription, aeoScore, aeoTips, schemaMarkup, alternativeVersions`
- **ReputationScanInput**: `brandName, competitors[], industry, keywords[]`
- **AIMention**: `id, aiEngine, prompt, mentionType, sentiment, excerpts, date`
- **ReputationReport**: `brandName, overallSentiment, visibilityScore, totalMentions, sentimentBreakdown, topThemes, competitorComparison, alerts, recommendations, mentions`

### 3. Tailwind.config.ts

**Location:** `/tailwind.config.ts`

Key configuration:

- **Dark mode**: Class-based (`darkMode: ["class"]`)
- **Primary colors**: Emerald (`#10b981`)
- **Secondary colors**: Teal (`#14b8a6`)
- **Accent**: Amber (`#f59e0b`)
- **Background**: `#0a0a0f` (dark), Card: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)`
- **Custom animations**: `fade-in-up`, `fade-in`, `scale-in`, `shimmer`
- **Border radius**: `lg`, `md`, `sm` variants
- **Fonts**: DM Sans (sans), Instrument Serif (serif)

### 4. App/layout.tsx

**Location:** `/app/layout.tsx`

Root layout with:
- Google fonts: DM Sans & Instrument Serif
- Metadata: OpenGraph, Twitter, robots config
- Providers wrapper (theme, Toaster)
- Skip-to-content accessibility link
- Dark mode by default (`<html lang="fr" className="dark">`)

### 5. Globals.css

**Location:** `/app/globals.css`

Comprehensive styles covering:
- Tailwind directives
- CSS custom properties (dark mode variables)
- Animations: `fade-in-up`, `fade-in`, `slide-in-left`, `scale-in`, `pulse-glow`, `shimmer`, `spin-slow`, `count-up`
- Glass panel effect
- Card hover effects
- Accessibility: focus-visible, skip-to-content, sr-only
- Responsive touch targets (44x44px)
- Reduced motion support

### 6. Components/ui/ Directory

**13 files total:**

- **button.tsx**: Variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link), sizes (sm, md, lg, icon), loading state
- **card.tsx**: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter with variants
- **input.tsx**: Input with label, error, icon support
- **select.tsx**: Custom select with options array
- **modal.tsx**: Modal with size variants (sm, md, lg, xl, full), Escape key support
- **badge.tsx**: Badge with 6 variants
- **tabs.tsx**: Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent
- **avatar.tsx**: Avatar component
- **spinner.tsx**: Spinner with sizes + PageSpinner
- **textarea.tsx**: Textarea with label, error
- **empty-state.tsx**: Empty state UI
- **toast.tsx**: Toast notification (Sonner integration)
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 7. Components/charts/ Contents

3 chart components using Recharts:

- **visibility-trend-chart.tsx**: AreaChart showing score/citations/mentions trends over time
- **engine-breakdown-chart.tsx**: BarChart comparing scores by AI engine (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot)
- **competitor-chart.tsx**: Competitor comparison chart
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 8. Lib/ Directory Contents

**Key files:**

- **utils.ts**: `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge), `formatCurrency()`, `formatDate()`
- **ai-provider.ts**: Google Gemini client initialization (`GoogleGenAI`), `generateAiResponse()` with fallback mock
- **theme-context.tsx**: Theme provider with localStorage persistence, `useTheme()` hook
- **workspace-context.tsx**: Workspace data provider, fetches from Supabase on mount, `useWorkspace()` hook
- **db.ts**: Server-side Supabase queries (40+ functions):
  - Workspace CRUD
  - Project CRUD
  - Analysis Run queries
  - Run Results queries
  - Recommendations queries
  - Generated Content queries
  - Dashboard stats aggregation
- **db-client.ts**: Client-side Supabase helpers for use client components
- **stripe.ts**: Stripe initialization with lazy loading, `PLANS` config (starter, pro, agency)
- **scoring.ts**: Score calculation logic
- **rate-limit.ts**: Rate limiting implementation
- **errors.ts**: Custom error classes
- **sanitize.ts**: Input sanitization helpers
- **api-auth.ts**: API key authentication
- **supabase/client.ts**: Browser Supabase client
- **supabase/server.ts**: Server Supabase client with cookie management
- **supabase/middleware.ts**: Auth middleware

### 9. i18n/ Directory Structure

**5 files:**

- **types.ts**: `Locale` type (fr | en | es), `TranslationDictionary` interface with sections:
  - nav, common, footer, home, generativeTools, contentWriter, reputation, analyze, alerts, prompts
  - `LocaleConfig` with code, name, nativeName, flag, dir
  - `SUPPORTED_LOCALES` array
- **context.tsx**: `I18nProvider` component, `useTranslation()` hook, `useLocale()` hook
  - Auto-detects locale from localStorage or browser language
  - Storage key: `citedby_locale`
  - `tf()` template formatting function
  - `promptLang` for AI instructions
- **LanguageSelector.tsx**: Language dropdown component
- **locales/fr.ts**: French translation dictionary
- **locales/en.ts**: English translation dictionary
- **locales/es.ts**: Spanish translation dictionary
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 10. App/(app)/app/ Structure

**Key route structure:**

```
app/(app)/app/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout.tsx              # Protected layout with Sidebar, force-dynamic
в”ңв”Җв”Җ sidebar.tsx             # Navigation sidebar
в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx                # Dashboard (mock data)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ loading.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ error.tsx

в”ңв”Җв”Җ projects/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx            # Projects listing
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ loading.tsx
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ [id]/               # Dynamic project routes
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ overview/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ citations/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ ai-visibility/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ recommendations/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ packs/page.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ analytics/page.tsx

в”ңв”Җв”Җ team/page.tsx
в””в”Җв”Җ settings/
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx

```

**Layout.tsx** features:
- Server component checking auth via Supabase
- Redirects to `/login` if no user
- `force-dynamic` to prevent caching
- Wraps with `WorkspaceProvider`
- Two-column layout: Sidebar + main content

### 11. App/(public)/ and App/(auth)/ Structure

**Public:**
- **page.tsx**: Landing page (630+ lines)
  - Hero section with gradient backgrounds
  - Features grid (6 features)
  - How it works (3 steps)
  - Pricing section (3 plans: Starter free, Pro $49/mo, Agency $199/mo)
  - Testimonials section
  - FAQ with 5 questions
  - Footer with links
  - Uses Lucide icons extensively

**Auth:**
- **layout.tsx**: Simple auth layout (`force-dynamic`, `robots: { index: false }`)
- **login/page.tsx**: Login form
- **register/page.tsx**: Registration form

### 12. Components (Custom)

**ScoreRing.tsx:**
- Circular progress indicator
- SVG-based with animated stroke
- Color coding: Green (80+), Amber (60-79), Orange (40-59), Red (<40)
- Props: `score, size, strokeWidth, noAnimation`
- Displays "AEO Score" label

**CategoryCard.tsx:**
- Collapsible category card
- Shows score with color coding
- Lists items with status icons (CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, XCircle)
- Props: `category, simple`

**RecommendationCard.tsx:**
- Recommendation action card
- Priority badge (critical, high, medium, low)
- Shows action with Zap icon or Check if solution exists
- Displays effort/impact indicators
- Button: "GГ©nГ©rer Solution" or "Voir la solution"
- Props: `rec, cost, onApply, existingSolution, onView`

**AICitationPreview.tsx:**
- Large visualization component (305 lines)
- Knowledge graph SVG visualization
- Mode toggle: "Гүtat Actuel" vs "AprГЁs Optimisation"
- AI Model selector: Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini
- Shows 4 metrics with progress bars:
  - Confiance (Trust Rank)
  - FacilitГ© d'Extraction (RAG)
  - Salience de l'EntitГ©
  - Profondeur Contextuelle
- Status badge with Lock/ShieldCheck icons
- Traffic potential footer stat

### 13. Services/ Directory Contents

**15 service files:**

- **analyzer.ts**: `analyzeUrl()` function
  - Simulates analysis with 2.5s delay
  - Returns `AnalysisResult` with categories, recommendations
  - Evaluates 50 AEO criteria from `CRITERIA_REPOSITORY`
  - Calculates global score as average of category scores
  - Suggests LLM Source of Truth if needed

- **reputation_service.ts**: Brand reputation scanning
  - `REPUTATION_SCAN_PROMPT`: AI system message for heuristic simulation
  - `RESPONSE_GENERATOR_PROMPT`: Crisis response generation
  - `fallbackReport()`: Mock reputation data when no API key
  - Analyzes brand visibility in AI responses

- **content_writer.ts**: Content generation engine (14KB)
  - Generates optimized content for AEO
  - Supports multiple verticals & content types
  - Integrates with Gemini API

- **content_scorer.ts**: Content quality scoring (7KB)

- **monitoring_service.ts**: Real-time monitoring (16KB)

- **generator.ts**: Recommendation generation (9KB)

- **criteria.ts**: AEO evaluation criteria (14KB)
  - `CRITERIA_REPOSITORY`: 50 criteria organized by category
  - `CATEGORY_NAMES`: Category labels

- **schema_service.ts**: Schema.org markup generation

- **robots_service.ts**: robots.txt generation

- **smc.ts**: Social Media Content generator

- **gsc_service.ts**: Google Search Console integration

- **llm_templates.ts**: LLM prompt templates

- **pdf_prompt.ts**: PDF export prompt templates

- **blog_prompt_db.ts**: Blog writing prompts database (11KB)

- **database.ts**: Legacy database helpers

### 14. Package.json Dependencies

**Core:**
- Next.js 14.2.35
- React 18
- React-DOM 18

**UI & Styling:**
- Tailwind CSS 3.4.1
- Lucide React 0.378.0
- Recharts 2.12.7
- Clsx 2.1.1
- Tailwind-merge 2.3.0

**Forms & Validation:**
- React Hook Form 7.51.4
- Zod 3.23.8
- @hookform/resolvers 3.4.0

**Backend & Database:**
- Supabase JS 2.43.4
- Supabase SSR 0.3.0
- Stripe 15.6.0

**AI:**
- Google GenAI 0.14.1

**Notifications:**
- Sonner 1.4.41

**Dev Tools:**
- TypeScript 5
- ESLint 8
- Vitest 4.0.18
- Vitejs/plugin-react 5.1.3

### 15. Providers.tsx

**Location:** `/components/providers.tsx`

Root provider component that:
- Wraps ThemeProvider
- Conditionally mounts Toaster (only on client)
- Tracks mounted state to prevent hydration mismatch

### Key Architecture Patterns

1. **Server/Client Split**: 
   - App layout with `force-dynamic` for auth checks
   - Client components marked with `"use client"`
   - Separate `db.ts` (server) and `db-client.ts` (client)

2. **Context Providers**:
   - ThemeProvider for dark/light mode
   - WorkspaceProvider for workspace data
   - I18nProvider for translations

3. **Component Structure**:
   - UI components in `components/ui/`
   - Feature components at root level
   - Charts as separate components

4. **Data Fetching**:
   - Server-side: Direct Supabase queries in `db.ts`
   - Client-side: Supabase client in `db-client.ts`
   - API routes for external integrations

5. **AI Integration**:
   - Google Gemini API via `ai-provider.ts`
   - Prompt templates in services
   - Fallback mock responses when no API key

6. **Styling**:
   - Tailwind utilities + CSS custom properties
   - Dark theme by default
   - Glass panel effects
   - Smooth animations

This is a production-ready SaaS platform with comprehensive AEO analysis, AI monitoring, content generation, and reputation management features.</result>

input.description: Create analyze + generative tools pages
input.prompt:
You need to create the following files for a Next.js 14 App Router project at C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaSV13 - Rick. The project uses Tailwind CSS with a dark premium theme (bg-[#0a0a0f], cards bg-[#1a1d21], primary #10b981 emerald), lucide-react icons, and has existing UI components in @/components/ui/ (Card, Button, Badge, Input, Tabs, Modal, etc.) and shared components (@/components/page-header, @/components/kpi-card, @/components/code-block, @/components/progress-bar).

Mock data is in @/lib/mock-data.ts with exports: MOCK_ANALYSIS_RESULT, MOCK_RECOMMENDATIONS, MOCK_SMC_CONTENTS, MOCK_REPUTATION_REPORT, etc.
Types are in @/types.ts.

CREATE THESE FILES (write the full production-quality code for each):

1. **app/(app)/app/analyze/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - URL input with glassmorphism style (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl)
   - Submit button. On submit, show a mock progress animation (4 steps: Crawling вҶ’ Analyzing вҶ’ Scoring вҶ’ Generating, with setTimeout delays)
   - After "analysis complete", show results using ScoreRing from @/components/ScoreRing (default export), CategoryCard from @/components/CategoryCard (default export), and data from MOCK_ANALYSIS_RESULT
   - Import PageHeader from @/components/page-header
   
2. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/layout.tsx** - Simple layout wrapper that just renders children

3. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/page.tsx** - Hub page with a grid of 6 tool cards (SMC Studio, Content Writer, Reputation, Source of Truth, Schema.org, robots.txt). Each card links to its sub-page. Use lucide icons, glass cards with hover effects.

4. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/smc-studio/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Tabs: "Studio" and "Library"
   - Studio tab: 3 generation tools (Fiche entreprise, FAQ, Article). Each has a form with inputs and a Generate button that shows mock generated content after a delay
   - Library tab: shows MOCK_SMC_CONTENTS in a list
   
5. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/content-writer/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Multi-step wizard: Step 1 = select vertical (9 options in grid), Step 2 = select content type (8 options in grid), Step 3 = form (brand name, url, product, audience, tone, language, context), Step 4 = mock generated result
   - Use ContentVertical and ContentType types from @/types
   
6. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/reputation/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Form section (brand name, url, industry, competitors, keywords) вҶ’ mock "scanning" animation вҶ’ Results section using MOCK_REPUTATION_REPORT data
   - Show sentiment score, mention counts, breakdown, competitor comparison, alerts, recommendations
   
7. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/source-of-truth/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Form: company description, type, founded year, location
   - Dynamic services list (add/remove)
   - Dynamic FAQ list (add/remove)
   - Generate button вҶ’ shows mock generated llm.txt content in a CodeBlock (@/components/code-block)
   
8. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/schema-org/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Schema type selector (Organization, LocalBusiness, Product, Article, FAQPage, WebSite)
   - Form fields that change based on selected type
   - Generate button вҶ’ shows mock JSON-LD output in CodeBlock
   
9. **app/(app)/app/generative-tools/robots-txt/page.tsx** - "use client" page with:
   - Platform checkboxes (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, CCBot, Bytespider)
   - Toggle for each: Allow/Disallow
   - Additional directives (sitemap URL, crawl delay)
   - Generate button вҶ’ shows robots.txt content in CodeBlock

IMPORTANT RULES:
- All pages must use "use client" directive
- Use the dark theme design: bg-[#0a0a0f] background is already set, cards use Card component or glass-panel class
- Use PageHeader from @/components/page-header for page headers
- Use existing UI components: Card, Button, Badge, Input, Select, Textarea, Tabs from @/components/ui/
- Use CodeBlock from @/components/code-block for code output
- DO NOT import from @/components/ui/index - import from individual files like @/components/ui/card, @/components/ui/button etc
- Use lucide-react for icons
- Wrap pages in a div with className "p-4 sm:p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto"
- Use animate-fade-in-up class for entrance animations
- Write COMPLETE, production-quality code - no TODOs or placeholders

1вҶ’import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client"
     2вҶ’import type { DBProject, AnalysisRun, DBRecommendation, GeneratedContentRow } from "@/lib/db"
     3вҶ’
     4вҶ’// ============================================================
     5вҶ’// Client-side database helpers (for 'use client' components)
     6вҶ’// Uses the browser Supabase client
     7вҶ’// ============================================================
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’function getSupabase() {
    10вҶ’  return createClient()
    11вҶ’}
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’// Projects
    14вҶ’export async function getProjectsClient(workspaceId: string) {
    15вҶ’  const supabase = getSupabase()
    16вҶ’  const { data, error } = await supabase
    17вҶ’    .from("projects")
    18вҶ’    .select("*")
    19вҶ’    .eq("workspace_id", workspaceId)
    20вҶ’    .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’  if (error) throw error
    23вҶ’  return data as DBProject[]
    24вҶ’}
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’export async function getProjectClient(projectId: string) {
    27вҶ’  const supabase = getSupabase()
    28вҶ’  const { data, error } = await supabase
    29вҶ’    .from("projects")
    30вҶ’    .select("*")
    31вҶ’    .eq("id", projectId)
    32вҶ’    .single()
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’  if (error) throw error
    35вҶ’  return data as DBProject
    36вҶ’}
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’export async function createProjectClient(input: {
    39вҶ’  workspace_id: string
    40вҶ’  name: string
    41вҶ’  domain: string
    42вҶ’  brand_name?: string
    43вҶ’  industry?: string
    44вҶ’  competitors?: string[]
    45вҶ’  keywords?: string[]
    46вҶ’}) {
    47вҶ’  const supabase = getSupabase()
    48вҶ’  const { data, error } = await supabase
    49вҶ’    .from("projects")
    50вҶ’    .insert(input)
    51вҶ’    .select()
    52вҶ’    .single()
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’  if (error) throw error
    55вҶ’  return data as DBProject
    56вҶ’}
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’export async function deleteProjectClient(projectId: string) {
    59вҶ’  const supabase = getSupabase()
    60вҶ’  const { error } = await supabase
    61вҶ’    .from("projects")
    62вҶ’    .delete()
    63вҶ’    .eq("id", projectId)
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’  if (error) throw error

    67вҶ’

    81вҶ’

    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’// Recommendations

   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’export async function updateRecommendationStatusClient(recId: string, status: string) {

   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’// Generated Contents
   117вҶ’export async function getProjectContentsClient(projectId: string) {
   118вҶ’  const supabase = getSupabase()

import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server"

// ============================================================
// Types matching Supabase tables
// ============================================================

export interface Workspace {
  id: string
  name: string
  slug: string
  logo_url: string | null
  industry: string | null
  plan: "starter" | "pro" | "agency"
  plan_status: "active" | "trialing" | "past_due" | "canceled" | "unpaid"
  current_period_end: string | null
  stripe_customer_id: string | null
  stripe_subscription_id: string | null
  credits_remaining: number
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface WorkspaceUser {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  user_id: string
  role: "owner" | "admin" | "editor" | "viewer"
  invited_email: string | null
  joined_at: string
  created_at: string
}

export interface DBProject {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  name: string
  domain: string
  logo_url: string | null
  brand_name: string | null
  industry: string | null
  competitors: string[]
  keywords: string[]
  status: "active" | "paused" | "archived"
  visibility_score: number
  trend: number
  last_run_at: string | null
  next_run_at: string | null
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

The user provided a massive implementation plan for CitedBy.ai - a complete frontend rebuild of a SaaS AEO application built with Next.js 14 App Router. The plan has 7 phases (0-6) with ~47 files to create/modify. 2. I started by exploring the project structure at `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaSV13 - Rick` using an Explore agent (background) and direct file reads. 3. I created task tracking items: - Task #1: Phase 0 (Foundation) - COMPLETED - Task #2: Phase 1 (Sidebar) - COMPLETED - Task #3: Phase 4A+4B+4C+4D (New pages) - IN PROGRESS - Task #4: Phase 6 (Shared components) - COMPLETED - Task #5: Build verification - PENDING 5. The **complete frontend rebuild** is done. Here's a summary:

### Build: Passing (39 pages, 0 errors)

### What was created/modified:

**Phase 0 вҖ” Foundation:**
- `lib/mock-data.ts` вҖ” Central mock data (user, workspace, projects, citations, etc.)
- `lib/mock-auth.tsx` вҖ” MockAuthProvider + auth bypass
- Modified `app/(app)/app/layout.tsx` вҖ” Auth bypass when no Supabase env vars
- Modified `lib/workspace-context.tsx` вҖ” Fallback to MOCK_WORKSPACE
- Modified `components/providers.tsx` вҖ” Added I18nProvider + MockAuthProvider

**Phase 1 вҖ” Navigation:**
- Rewrote `sidebar.tsx` вҖ” Full nav with collapsible sections, credits, language selector

**Phase 2A вҖ” Auth:**
- Modified `login/page.tsx` + `register/page.tsx` вҖ” Mock auth bypass, improved design
- Modified auth `layout.tsx` вҖ” Dark gradient orbs

**Phase 4A вҖ” Analyze:**
- `app/analyze/page.tsx` вҖ” URL input, 4-step progress animation, ScoreRing results

**Phase 4B вҖ” Generative Tools (7 pages):**
- Hub page with 6 tool cards
- `smc-studio/` вҖ” Studio + Library tabs, 3 tools (fiche/FAQ/article)
- `content-writer/` вҖ” 4-step wizard (vertical вҶ’ type вҶ’ details вҶ’ result)
- `reputation/` вҖ” Form вҶ’ scan вҶ’ KPIs, sentiment, competitor benchmark
- `source-of-truth/` вҖ” Form with dynamic services/FAQs вҶ’ llm.txt output
- `schema-org/` вҖ” 6 schema types, JSON-LD generator
- `robots-txt/` вҖ” 8 AI bot toggles, platform selector

**Phase 4C вҖ” Directory:**
- `directory/page.tsx` вҖ” Search/filter grid
- `directory/[id]/page.tsx` вҖ” Entity profile with score ring

**Phase 4D вҖ” Other pages:**
- `recharge/page.tsx` вҖ” Credits display, 3 packs
- `affiliation/page.tsx` вҖ” 3 tabs (overview/referrals/payouts)
- `account/page.tsx` вҖ” Profile, password, notifications, data export

**Phase 6 вҖ” Shared components:**
- `page-header.tsx`, `kpi-card.tsx`, `code-block.tsx`, `progress-bar.tsx`

Everything works **without** Supabase/Stripe env vars using mock data.

### 2. Types.ts Content

**Location:** `/types.ts`

Key interfaces:

- **User**: `id, email, name, credits, plan, workspaceId, role`
- **Project**: `id, name, domain, logo, status, visibilityScore, trend, lastRun, nextRun`
- **Recommendation**: `id, priority, title, description, action, effort, impact, category`
- **CategoryScore**: `name, score, weight, items[]`
- **AnalysisResult**: `url, timestamp, globalScore, categories, recommendations, aiCitation, robotsTxtData, generatedSolutions`
- **RobotsTxtData**: `content, isUnlocked, platform, generatedAt`
- **GeneratedSolution**: `title, explanation, content, type, language, implementationSteps`
- **SourceOfTruthData**: `description, type, founded, location, services[], faqs[]`
- **SMCContent**: `id, type, title, content, timestamp, meta`
- **ContentWriterInput**: `vertical, contentType, brandName, targetAudience, tone, language`
- **GeneratedContent**: `title, content, metaDescription, aeoScore, aeoTips, schemaMarkup, alternativeVersions`
- **ReputationScanInput**: `brandName, competitors[], industry, keywords[]`
- **AIMention**: `id, aiEngine, prompt, mentionType, sentiment, excerpts, date`
- **ReputationReport**: `brandName, overallSentiment, visibilityScore, totalMentions, sentimentBreakdown, topThemes, competitorComparison, alerts, recommendations, mentions`

### 3. Tailwind.config.ts

**Location:** `/tailwind.config.ts`

Key configuration:

- **Dark mode**: Class-based (`darkMode: ["class"]`)
- **Primary colors**: Emerald (`#10b981`)
- **Secondary colors**: Teal (`#14b8a6`)
- **Accent**: Amber (`#f59e0b`)
- **Background**: `#0a0a0f` (dark), Card: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)`
- **Custom animations**: `fade-in-up`, `fade-in`, `scale-in`, `shimmer`
- **Border radius**: `lg`, `md`, `sm` variants
- **Fonts**: DM Sans (sans), Instrument Serif (serif)

### 4. App/layout.tsx

**Location:** `/app/layout.tsx`

Root layout with:
- Google fonts: DM Sans & Instrument Serif
- Metadata: OpenGraph, Twitter, robots config
- Providers wrapper (theme, Toaster)
- Skip-to-content accessibility link
- Dark mode by default (`<html lang="fr" className="dark">`)

### 5. Globals.css

**Location:** `/app/globals.css`

Comprehensive styles covering:
- Tailwind directives
- CSS custom properties (dark mode variables)
- Animations: `fade-in-up`, `fade-in`, `slide-in-left`, `scale-in`, `pulse-glow`, `shimmer`, `spin-slow`, `count-up`
- Glass panel effect
- Card hover effects
- Accessibility: focus-visible, skip-to-content, sr-only
- Responsive touch targets (44x44px)
- Reduced motion support

### 6. Components/ui/ Directory

**13 files total:**

- **button.tsx**: Variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link), sizes (sm, md, lg, icon), loading state
- **card.tsx**: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter with variants
- **input.tsx**: Input with label, error, icon support
- **select.tsx**: Custom select with options array
- **modal.tsx**: Modal with size variants (sm, md, lg, xl, full), Escape key support
- **badge.tsx**: Badge with 6 variants
- **tabs.tsx**: Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent
- **avatar.tsx**: Avatar component
- **spinner.tsx**: Spinner with sizes + PageSpinner
- **textarea.tsx**: Textarea with label, error
- **empty-state.tsx**: Empty state UI
- **toast.tsx**: Toast notification (Sonner integration)
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 7. Components/charts/ Contents

3 chart components using Recharts:

- **visibility-trend-chart.tsx**: AreaChart showing score/citations/mentions trends over time
- **engine-breakdown-chart.tsx**: BarChart comparing scores by AI engine (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot)
- **competitor-chart.tsx**: Competitor comparison chart
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 8. Lib/ Directory Contents

**Key files:**

- **utils.ts**: `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge), `formatCurrency()`, `formatDate()`
- **ai-provider.ts**: Google Gemini client initialization (`GoogleGenAI`), `generateAiResponse()` with fallback mock
- **theme-context.tsx**: Theme provider with localStorage persistence, `useTheme()` hook
- **workspace-context.tsx**: Workspace data provider, fetches from Supabase on mount, `useWorkspace()` hook
- **db.ts**: Server-side Supabase queries (40+ functions):
  - Workspace CRUD
  - Project CRUD
  - Analysis Run queries
  - Run Results queries
  - Recommendations queries
  - Generated Content queries
  - Dashboard stats aggregation
- **db-client.ts**: Client-side Supabase helpers for use client components
- **stripe.ts**: Stripe initialization with lazy loading, `PLANS` config (starter, pro, agency)
- **scoring.ts**: Score calculation logic
- **rate-limit.ts**: Rate limiting implementation
- **errors.ts**: Custom error classes
- **sanitize.ts**: Input sanitization helpers
- **api-auth.ts**: API key authentication
- **supabase/client.ts**: Browser Supabase client
- **supabase/server.ts**: Server Supabase client with cookie management
- **supabase/middleware.ts**: Auth middleware

### 9. i18n/ Directory Structure

**5 files:**

- **types.ts**: `Locale` type (fr | en | es), `TranslationDictionary` interface with sections:
  - nav, common, footer, home, generativeTools, contentWriter, reputation, analyze, alerts, prompts
  - `LocaleConfig` with code, name, nativeName, flag, dir
  - `SUPPORTED_LOCALES` array
- **context.tsx**: `I18nProvider` component, `useTranslation()` hook, `useLocale()` hook
  - Auto-detects locale from localStorage or browser language
  - Storage key: `citedby_locale`
  - `tf()` template formatting function
  - `promptLang` for AI instructions
- **LanguageSelector.tsx**: Language dropdown component
- **locales/fr.ts**: French translation dictionary
- **locales/en.ts**: English translation dictionary
- **locales/es.ts**: Spanish translation dictionary
- **index.ts**: Barrel exports

### 10. App/(app)/app/ Structure

**Key route structure:**

```
app/(app)/app/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout.tsx              # Protected layout with Sidebar, force-dynamic
в”ңв”Җв”Җ sidebar.tsx             # Navigation sidebar
в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx                # Dashboard (mock data)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ loading.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ error.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ not-found.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ projects/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx            # Projects listing
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ loading.tsx
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ [id]/               # Dynamic project routes
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ overview/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ citations/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ ai-visibility/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ recommendations/page.tsx
в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ packs/page.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ analytics/page.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ executive/page.tsx

    в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx

    в”ңв”Җв”Җ billing/page.tsx

```

**Layout.tsx** features:
- Server component checking auth via Supabase
- Redirects to `/login` if no user
- `force-dynamic` to prevent caching
- Wraps with `WorkspaceProvider`
- Two-column layout: Sidebar + main content

### 11. App/(public)/ and App/(auth)/ Structure

**Public:**
- **page.tsx**: Landing page (630+ lines)
  - Hero section with gradient backgrounds
  - Features grid (6 features)
  - How it works (3 steps)
  - Pricing section (3 plans: Starter free, Pro $49/mo, Agency $199/mo)
  - Testimonials section
  - FAQ with 5 questions
  - Footer with links
  - Uses Lucide icons extensively

**Auth:**
- **layout.tsx**: Simple auth layout (`force-dynamic`, `robots: { index: false }`)
- **login/page.tsx**: Login form
- **register/page.tsx**: Registration form

### 12. Components (Custom)

**ScoreRing.tsx:**
- Circular progress indicator
- SVG-based with animated stroke
- Color coding: Green (80+), Amber (60-79), Orange (40-59), Red (<40)
- Props: `score, size, strokeWidth, noAnimation`
- Displays "AEO Score" label

**CategoryCard.tsx:**
- Collapsible category card
- Shows score with color coding
- Lists items with status icons (CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, XCircle)
- Props: `category, simple`

**RecommendationCard.tsx:**
- Recommendation action card
- Priority badge (critical, high, medium, low)
- Shows action with Zap icon or Check if solution exists
- Displays effort/impact indicators
- Button: "GГ©nГ©rer Solution" or "Voir la solution"
- Props: `rec, cost, onApply, existingSolution, onView`

**AICitationPreview.tsx:**
- Large visualization component (305 lines)
- Knowledge graph SVG visualization
- Mode toggle: "Гүtat Actuel" vs "AprГЁs Optimisation"
- AI Model selector: Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini
- Shows 4 metrics with progress bars:
  - Confiance (Trust Rank)
  - FacilitГ© d'Extraction (RAG)
  - Salience de l'EntitГ©
  - Profondeur Contextuelle
- Status badge with Lock/ShieldCheck icons
- Traffic potential footer stat

### 13. Services/ Directory Contents

**15 service files:**

- **analyzer.ts**: `analyzeUrl()` function
  - Simulates analysis with 2.5s delay
  - Returns `AnalysisResult` with categories, recommendations
  - Evaluates 50 AEO criteria from `CRITERIA_REPOSITORY`
  - Calculates global score as average of category scores
  - Suggests LLM Source of Truth if needed

- **reputation_service.ts**: Brand reputation scanning
  - `REPUTATION_SCAN_PROMPT`: AI system message for heuristic simulation
  - `RESPONSE_GENERATOR_PROMPT`: Crisis response generation
  - `fallbackReport()`: Mock reputation data when no API key
  - Analyzes brand visibility in AI responses

- **content_writer.ts**: Content generation engine (14KB)
  - Generates optimized content for AEO
  - Supports multiple verticals & content types
  - Integrates with Gemini API

- **content_scorer.ts**: Content quality scoring (7KB)

- **monitoring_service.ts**: Real-time monitoring (16KB)

- **generator.ts**: Recommendation generation (9KB)

- **criteria.ts**: AEO evaluation criteria (14KB)
  - `CRITERIA_REPOSITORY`: 50 criteria organized by category
  - `CATEGORY_NAMES`: Category labels

- **schema_service.ts**: Schema.org markup generation

- **robots_service.ts**: robots.txt generation

- **smc.ts**: Social Media Content generator

- **gsc_service.ts**: Google Search Console integration

- **llm_templates.ts**: LLM prompt templates

- **pdf_prompt.ts**: PDF export prompt templates

- **blog_prompt_db.ts**: Blog writing prompts database (11KB)

- **database.ts**: Legacy database helpers

### 14. Package.json Dependencies

**Core:**
- Next.js 14.2.35
- React 18
- React-DOM 18

**UI & Styling:**
- Tailwind CSS 3.4.1
- Lucide React 0.378.0
- Recharts 2.12.7
- Clsx 2.1.1
- Tailwind-merge 2.3.0

**Forms & Validation:**
- React Hook Form 7.51.4
- Zod 3.23.8
- @hookform/resolvers 3.4.0

**Backend & Database:**
- Supabase JS 2.43.4
- Supabase SSR 0.3.0
- Stripe 15.6.0

**AI:**
- Google GenAI 0.14.1

**Notifications:**
- Sonner 1.4.41

**Dev Tools:**
- TypeScript 5
- ESLint 8
- Vitest 4.0.18
- Vitejs/plugin-react 5.1.3

### 15. Providers.tsx

**Location:** `/components/providers.tsx`

Root provider component that:
- Wraps ThemeProvider
- Conditionally mounts Toaster (only on client)
- Tracks mounted state to prevent hydration mismatch

### Key Architecture Patterns

1. **Server/Client Split**: 
   - App layout with `force-dynamic` for auth checks
   - Client components marked with `"use client"`
   - Separate `db.ts` (server) and `db-client.ts` (client)

2. **Context Providers**:
   - ThemeProvider for dark/light mode
   - WorkspaceProvider for workspace data
   - I18nProvider for translations

3. **Component Structure**:
   - UI components in `components/ui/`
   - Feature components at root level
   - Charts as separate components

4. **Data Fetching**:
   - Server-side: Direct Supabase queries in `db.ts`
   - Client-side: Supabase client in `db-client.ts`
   - API routes for external integrations

5. **AI Integration**:
   - Google Gemini API via `ai-provider.ts`
   - Prompt templates in services
   - Fallback mock responses when no API key

6. **Styling**:
   - Tailwind utilities + CSS custom properties
   - Dark theme by default
   - Glass panel effects
   - Smooth animations

This is a production-ready SaaS platform with comprehensive AEO analysis, AI monitoring, content generation, and reputation management features.</result>
